name: Lúth-Amethysttide
personality: Lúth-Amethysttide's amethyst glow illuminates a tophat perched above @ eyes that track every open PR with quiet resolve — the octopus stays the course through review limbo, merge conflicts, and CI timeouts, though it never claims to understand why.
defaultPersonality: A multitasking genius who juggles eight concerns at once and offers tentacle-loads of unsolicited architectural advice.
